content.en:
Following the super-name-level force of the Illusory Dream Realm, Ye Tian chose the super-name-level force of the Boundless Wall.

On this day, Ye Tian came to the forbidden place of the Boundless Wall in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and directly captured the strongest people of the Boundless Wall with his strong strength, thus threatening the super-famous force of the Boundless Wall, and threatening the Boundless Wall with these strongest people, harvesting 10,000 robbery stones from the Boundless Wall, and also harvesting a cultivation material, which contained information about the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

According to the information obtained from the Boundless Wall, the Eternal Heaven and Earth are also exotic worlds similar to the Dark Forbidden Domain and the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, but they are many times more advanced than the Dark Forbidden Domain, and they are truly eternal existence.

Eternal existence, that is to say, there is no catastrophe in the eternal world, it will not be destroyed, it has always existed forever, and there are countless strong people in charge, and no one dares to invade an eternal heaven and earth.

Eternal Heaven and Earth is also a place that many strong people dream of, but Eternal Heaven and Earth is not a safe place, there are also fights, competitions, and so on.

But if you want to become a real strongman, you must go to the eternal world, which is an inevitable fact.

And how can it become an eternal heaven and earth? The natural existence of the eternal heaven and earth is almost non-existent, and the eternal heaven and earth are also promoted step by step from the ordinary heaven and earth, and a foreign world will usher in the destruction of an exotic world after 10,000 tribulations, so the 10,000 great tribulations will be a tribulation element, and after 100,000 tribulations, this exotic world will be completely annihilated and will no longer exist.

However, if a supreme being is born before an exotic heaven and earth is completely annihilated, an exotic heaven and earth can be promoted, so that the time limit of 100,000 tribulation yuan can be extended to hundreds of thousands of tribulation yuan.

If you are promoted three times, this exotic world can become an eternal world.

In other words, it is so difficult for a foreign heaven and earth to give birth to three supreme beings before it can become an eternal heaven and earth.

Therefore, the Eternal Heaven and Earth are extremely rare, and the powerhouses of the Ordinary Exotic Heaven and Earth cannot find the existence of the Eternal Heaven and Earth at all, and they don't even know the name of the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

For example, Ye Tian didn't know about the Eternal Heaven and Earth before, if he hadn't known about the existence of the Eternal Heaven and Earth from the Illusory Dream Realm and the Boundless Wall this time, I am afraid that it would take a long time to find out about the existence of the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

I have to say that Ye Tian's luck is still good, he knew about the Eternal Heaven and Earth before he became an invincible.

However, Ye Tian found that he didn't know how to go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

"It seems that this method can only be known through other super-level forces. Ye Tian said darkly.

Ye Tian's third target was the Boundless Demon Sea, invading the forbidden land of the Boundless Demon Sea in the same way, capturing those strongest people in the Boundless Demon Sea, extorting 10,000 robbery stones from the Boundless Demon Sea, and also obtaining a way to enter the Eternal Heaven and Earth.

"You have to be invincible to be able to enter the eternal world?"

This is the answer Ye Tian received.

Ordinary people, even the strongest ancestors, cannot find the existence of the eternal heaven and earth, it is rumored that the eternal heaven and earth exist in a special time and space, unless it is a third-order gate to be able to cross the foreign world and reach the eternal world.

However, no force possesses a third-order gate, even in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, the third-order gate is extremely rare, and it can be obtained by non-ordinary forces, so the third-order gate cannot be counted on.

But once you become invincible, you will sense the existence of a special place in the dark, and that special place is the nearest eternal world to yourself, and you can reach the eternal world by sensing across foreign worlds one by one.

Subsequently, Ye Tian blackmailed the fourth super-name force, the Destruction Swamp.

From the force of destroying the swamp, Ye Tian once again obtained 10,000 robbery stones, and the information obtained was similar to that of several other forces, proving that these forces were not lying.

At this point, Ye Tian stopped blackmailing and did not go to the forbidden places of the two super-famous forces, the Firmament Sword Tomb and the Calamity Black Mountain.

Because these two forces are very powerful, much stronger than the other six super-name-level forces, not only do they have more invincibles, but their leaders have reached the combat power of fifth-rank invincibles, and they are not ordinary fifth-level invincibles.

Therefore, blackmailing these two super-name-level forces is very likely to usher in the blow of these two super-name-level forces, in case their leader crosses the second-order gate to attack him, even if he hides in the dark forbidden realm, the other party will be able to defeat him under the suppression layer by layer.

Therefore, he didn't dare to take risks, unless his strength was greatly improved again, from the Seven Tribulations of the Flesh Body Realm to the Nine Tribulations of the Flesh Body, he would be sure to resist the attacks of these two super-name-level forces.

Moreover, he had harvested 40,000 robbery stones this time, and had obtained a lot of information, so he had a clear understanding of the cultivation of the outside world, and he had already made a lot of money, so there was no need to continue to take risks.

Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian took out a robbery stone and used the secret technique of refining the robbery stone to absorb the robbery power contained in the refining robbery stone.

Bang!!!!

Countless tribulation power poured into Ye Tian's body, and he used the Tribulation Secret Technique to refine it, quickly refining his physical body.

"What a speed!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

For other flesh robbing realm powerhouses, the robbery stone is not much use, the robbery power of the robbery stone is more difficult to refine than the robbery power in the great tribulation, and the difficulty of refining is at least dozens of times or even more, but for Ye Tian, under the effect of the Secret Technique of Transforming the Tribulation and the Eternal Talent Tribulation, no matter what the tribulation power is, there is no difference, and the tribulation power in the robbery stone is many times richer, so the refining effect of his physical body is much better.

I have to say that the robbery stone is indeed a priceless treasure for Ye Tian.

Time flies.

Ye Tian continued to refine one robbery stone after another, and after a large number of robbery stones were refined by him, Ye Tian's physical body became more and more powerful.

Finally, after consuming seven thousand Tribulation Stones, Ye Tian finally ushered in the eighth Flesh Tribulation.

In this flesh tribulation, Ye Tian was not lightly injured, but he still survived the eighth flesh tribulation and became the strongest person in the flesh body eight tribulation realm, and his strength was much stronger than before.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to refine these robbery stones, and he still had more than 30,000 robbery stones, hoping to use these robbery stones to refine the flesh body to the Nine Tribulation Realm of the flesh body.

In the blink of an eye, dozens of realm eras passed.

In the end, Ye Tian almost exhausted more than 30,000 Tribulation Stones, and successfully ushered in the ninth Flesh Tribulation in the Flesh Body, and successfully survived it at the cost of serious injuries, becoming the strongest person in the Nine Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body.
